Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Predictions on Polymarket | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's X predictions page shows 1346-1347 active markets, with the top one being "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?" at 97% odds for December 31, reflecting high trader conviction amid over $121M volume; no whale bets or X posts detailed in results.[1]
